title: Patent Plates
description: Three independent patent-style plates using monochrome linework, numbered callouts, and technical decomposition.
creative_direction: Each image should look like a clean patent drawing sheet rather than a rendered product: white background, black linework, FIG labels, and precise callout numbering.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Patent Plates
